steps.title: Write the total bags equation
steps.content:
The vendor sold 160 total bags of granola and pistachios. Since $x$ is granola bags and $y$ is pistachio bags:
$$x + y = 160$$

steps.title: Write the revenue equation and identify the system
steps.content:
Granola costs 8 dollars per bag and pistachios cost 13 dollars per bag. Total revenue is 1,675 dollars, so:
$$8x + 13y = 1,675$$
Our system is: $x + y = 160$ and $8x + 13y = 1,675$. Only Choice C — $8x + 13y = 1,675$ $x + y = 160$ lists both equations in this form. That matches Choice C — $8x + 13y = 1,675$ $x + y = 160$.
